name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Your chance to see Hamilton
body:
|
---

| | On July 29th at 6:30pm, I'll be at the State Theatre in Cleveland watching the Broadway sensation, _Hamilton_. Don't throw away your shot to be there with me. [**If you contribute $5 or more toward our $650,000 July goal, you will be automatically entered to come see _Hamilton_ in Cleveland with me.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff80f/4462dc26/6b9dd449/20078d8c/3538637643/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5YyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719c?refcode=sbe180719c_m_other&refcode2=3268183") We'll cover flights and hotel, too. All you need to worry about is picking who comes with you. | | | [DONATE TO WIN](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff80f/4462dc26/6b9dd449/20078d8c/3538637643/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5YyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719c?refcode=sbe180719c_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
We are engaged in a battle for our nation's very soul. History has its eyes on us. We only have one shot to win this campaign.
Special interests are attacking me. Both President Trump and Vice President Pence have come to Ohio to support my opponent. One recent poll shows us losing ground. If we don't fight hard these next three months, we will be disappointed on election night.
We will fight up close, seize the moment and stay in it, Peter. We have to hit each and every goal -- including our $650,000 July goal.
And this month, when you contribute $5 or more, you'll be automatically entered to win a trip to Cleveland to see _Hamilton_ with me.
[**Don't miss your chance. Make your contribution today and be automatically entered to win.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff80f/4462dc26/6b9dd449/20078d8c/3538637643/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5YyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719c?refcode=sbe180719c_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

name: The White House
subject: Employers commit to training 3.8 million workers
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f789dc6dfefe07cd6e9d63915e37f55420e790c7d1fc693ad08f38af0c8fdcb54e58741e3d05676ee5266a556ee0bfdcb274e7e73bb0f0e7) The White House • July 20, 2018
## Employers commit to training 3.8 million workers
**The economy has come roaring back to life** under President Donald J. Trump. This high-energy growth presents both a challenge and an opportunity. The challenge is that companies must find more workers to fill a growing number of open jobs. The opportunity is that with the right training, American workers will have the chance to move into better jobs with bigger paychecks. **This new national movement** began by asking companies and trade groups to sign a Pledge to America’s Workers. Yesterday, 23 organizations were the first to sign that pledge, committing to [3,817,700 new opportunities](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f789dc6dfefe07cd4f5d897031daaeead91ce880b8057a67ab77069c46766214f119a9e4f0703e2a3f8c545e242a3b3933077c6dd7837f55) for our country’s great workforce. **President Trump promised** to make Government work for ordinary Americans, and support for workforce training is key to that vision. “These great companies . . . are affirming their commitment to train American workers for American jobs,” the President said. **His new Executive Order** also establishes the National Council for the American Worker, which will develop a national strategy for workforce development. Unlike piling burdensome regulations on employers, the Council’s focus on transparency will actually _help_ the economy, allowing students and workers to make informed decisions about their careers. [As the economy booms, it’s time for a pledge to America’s workers.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f789dc6dfefe07cd66a6f838d84b2a4d431ac6ba0116cddffc67fc8cf615920325cbb874679838e220ea92e47fecebf553dee398717c149b) **Watch the highlights** : [President hosts workers and business leaders at the White House ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f789dc6dfefe07cd378737b132a9d9e4f52cfbfee5cf23b6b4bc7ecf595d6ac3f82b605de664839844801335ee187cd2f64428cd7adafc5f) |
---
|

## Judge Kavanaugh, as seen by his students
**“Anonymous evaluations of professors** by their students can be caustic or catty. But they are also unfailingly candid,” Adam Liptak of _The New York Times_ writes. “Over the last decade, about 350 law students at Harvard, Yale and Georgetown expressed views on classes offered by Judge Brett M. Kavanaugh, President Trump’s Supreme Court nominee.”
**The verdict?** “With rare exceptions, they praised his mastery of legal materials, intellectual rigor, fair-mindedness and accessibility,” Liptak writes.
**The quotes from his students** speak for themselves:
• | “Kavanaugh is the best professor I have had in law school.”
---|---
• | “Judge Kavanaugh’s presentation seemed very evenhanded.”
• | “I honestly believe I took a class that was instructed by a future Supreme Court justice.”
[“Best professor.” “Very evenhanded.” “Great hair.” - Kavanaugh, in his student’s eyes. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f789dc6dfefe07cd110866f2e1d31fd856867c27372ff6a3014291ab587cf0b25efab1c75843eb5883dafb35a3e8716954d9824da4c9d7ae)
---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**President Donald J. Trump signs an executive order during the Pledge to America’s Workers event** | July 19, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f789dc6dfefe07cd8b2691c1509fa19fa15a4fbb777efa63e88ea23b5fd4706ef80160d1f64c3e03405d188db9ac6b4b90774966705f89fb) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f789dc6dfefe07cd39352e4c62b483fcd67d6bcbc9470f885966b991e73be79cc1d276bf9f26fea926151183515fa675de2b08fa09c7ec8b) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d48fd2f21a009d9c860dcbe98eb5fb2e1751823ae3201bf82580f49e54e8cf0763e7fffce17c7200a5daa9ecd34dedfab2275014e48477d272)
---

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Somalian temporary status extended [good news!]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Yesterday the Administration agreed with our request to extend the temporary status for Somali immigrants who are in this country legally. This is good news.
---
Minnesota is home to the largest population of Somali immigrants in the country. They are contributing to our communities as small business owners, nurses, police officers, students, and teachers.

Extending Temporary Protected Status provides Somalis here legally the chance to continue contributing while building a future for themselves and their families. They came to our country fleeing violence in Somalia and sending them back would be dangerous for them and bad for Minnesota.

Minnesota and our nation stand by our Somali friends and we will continue to make sure they can always call this country home.

Thanks,

Amy

[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JWtra1%2FdT374saKjKbV%2BM0COwyziWSQt)

name: Martin Sheen
subject: A note from a former president
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter. I'm Martin Sheen. I may not be a real-life President, but there are three things I've learned about real-life politics. First: What's happening right now in America is not normal. The rhetoric coming from Washington is hateful and in opposition to the values of inclusion and equality America was built on. Second: To protect the principles we care so deeply about from the extremely partisan atmosphere -- like access to health care, a secure retirement, or investments in education or infrastructure -- we need to keep good lawmakers in place. **Senator Sherrod Brown is one of those lawmakers.** He doesn't just talk about progressive values; he embodies them. He fights for them. He's an authentic leader. Third: **We need to step up.** Never doubt that a group of concerned citizens, however small, can make a big difference. [**Peter, I'm asking you to help Sherrod. The deadline to meet his $650,000 July goal is at the end of the month. Can you give $5, $10, or more to help him reach that goal?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff80c/4462dc26/6bbd3768/20077272/2549685215/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719z?refcode=sbe180719z_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff80c/4462dc26/6bbd3768/20077271/2549685215/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719z?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180719z_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff80c/4462dc26/6bbd3768/20077271/2549685215/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719z?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180719z_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff80c/4462dc26/6bbd3768/20077271/2549685215/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719z?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180719z_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff80c/4462dc26/6bbd3768/20077272/2549685215/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719z?refcode=sbe180719z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** I've played a lot of roles in my career. A Captain in the Vietnam War. The uncle of a young superhero. A liberal U.S. President battling an opposition Congress. But in real life, I'm a guy from Ohio. I was born in Dayton. My mom was an Irish immigrant and my dad was a factory worker and machine inspector. **Sherrod is one of those rare lawmakers that lives up to the trust we place in him as an elected official.** He puts Ohio families first, last, and always. That's the guy I want representing my family in the Senate. [**Sherrod is facing tough resistance from right-wing special interest groups -- the Koch network plans to spend $400 million on the midterm elections. President Trump and Vice President Mike Pence threw their support behind Sherrod's opponent. If you can, chip in to help Sherrod hit his goal right now.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff80c/4462dc26/6bbd3768/20077272/2549685215/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719z?refcode=sbe180719z_m_other&refcode2=3268183") All the best, and thanks for helping Sherrod. Martin

name: Jason Yates
subject: SCOTUS Watch
body:
| | Critical Supreme Court Updates from a Faith Perspective
---
| The Supreme Court of the United States (SCOTUS) sits atop what has become, for good or for bad, the most powerful branch of our government, the federal judiciary. Every couple weeks I’m going to send you a SCOTUS watch update. According to Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, Brett Kavanaugh’s confirmation hearings are expected to begin in late August or early September. It’s critical that we watch the developments of Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation process so that we know how to pray for the future of the Supreme Court, and our nation. **Here’s the overall lay of the land when it comes to the confirmation votes Kavanaugh will need in the Senate.** Fifty-one members are needed to approve Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. There is no doubt this will be a very close vote. Several more liberal Republicans may vote “no” on Kavanaugh’s confirmation. Senators Susan Collins (ME), John McCain (AZ), Jeff Flake (AZ) and Bob Corker (TN) are all uncertain votes. But there are several Democrats who may be convinced to support Kavanaugh. Senators Joe Manchin (WV), Heidi Heitkamp (ND) and Joe Donnelly (IN) all voted to confirm Justice Gorsuch. And there is newly-elected Senator Doug Jones (AL), who replaced a pro-Gorsuch senator last year, as well as Tom Carper (WV), the only sitting Democratic Senator who voted to confirm Kavanaugh to his current DC position. **There are three valuable points we think you should know about nominee Judge Kavanaugh:**
* Judge Kavanaugh would be one of the most qualified individuals ever to serve on the Supreme Court. He currently sits on the D.C. Circuit—often referred to as the “Second Highest Court in the Land” - where he has served for over 12 years. Kavanaugh has spent 25 of the last 28 years serving the American people, most notably as Associate Independent Counsel, Associate White House Counsel, Assistant and Staff Secretary to President George W. Bush, and—of course—as a judge.
* Judge Kavanaugh is already deeply respected by the Supreme Court. The Supreme Court has endorsed his opinions more than a dozen times, including Kavanaugh dissents that have become the law of the land. His opinions are regularly cited by courts across the country. Of his 48 clerks, 39 have gone on to clerk at the Supreme Court.
* Judge Kavanaugh has a proven track record as the type of jurist that President Trump has promised to put on the Supreme Court. He has over 300 published opinions that reveal he believes in applying the law as written and upholding the text, structure and original understanding of the Constitution.

_Judge Kavanaugh once wrote, “The judge’s job is to interpret the law, not to make the law or make policy. So read the words of the statute as written. Read the text of the Constitution as written, mindful of history and tradition. Don’t make up new constitutional rights that are not in the text of the Constitution. Don’t shy away from enforcing constitutional rights that are in the text of the Constitution.”_ The battle to confirm Brett Kavanaugh, to fill the vacancy created by the retirement of Associate Justice Kennedy to the United States Supreme Court, will be one of the most contested in history. Remember, Justice Kennedy – the retiring justice whom Kavanaugh would replace – was generally a conservative vote. He was often the swing vote in favor of abortion and “gay” marriage, making this appointment the most important one for conservatives in more than 30 years. Every single vote in the Senate will be important to Kavanaugh’s confirmation to the Supreme Court. In the coming weeks, we’ll learn more about Kavanaugh and follow the Senate’s developments in this important confirmation vote. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180720com01&n=1)

* * *
The Supreme Court of the United States (SCOTUS) sits atop what has become, for good or for bad, the most powerful branch of our government, the federal judiciary. And there is newly-elected Senator Doug Jones (AL), who replaced a pro-Gorsuch senator last year, as well as Tom Carper (DE), the only sitting Democratic Senator who voted to confirm Kavanaugh to his current DC position. **There are three valuable points we think you should know about nominee Judge Kavanaugh:**
* Judge Kavanaugh would be one of the most qualified individuals ever to serve on the Supreme Court. He currently sits on the D.C. Circuit—often referred to as the “Second Highest Court in the Land” - where he has served for over 12 years. The Supreme Court has endorsed his opinions more than a dozen times, including Kavanaugh dissents that have become the law of the land. His opinions are regularly cited by courts across the country. Of his 48 clerks, 39 have gone on to clerk at the Supreme Court.
* Judge Kavanaugh has a proven track record as the type of jurist that President Trump has promised to put on the Supreme Court. He has over 300 published opinions that reveal he believes in applying the law as written and upholding the text, structure and original understanding of the Constitution.

_Judge Kavanaugh once wrote, “The judge’s job is to interpret the law, not to make the law or make policy. So read the words of the statute as written. Read the text of the Constitution as written, mindful of history and tradition. Don’t make up new constitutional rights that are not in the text of the Constitution. Don’t shy away from enforcing constitutional rights that are in the text of the Constitution.”_ The battle to confirm Brett Kavanaugh, to fill the vacancy created by the retirement of Associate Justice Kennedy to the United States Supreme Court, will be one of the most contested in history. Remember, Justice Kennedy – the retiring justice whom Kavanaugh would replace – was generally a conservative vote. He was often the swing vote in favor of abortion and “gay” marriage, making this appointment the most important one for conservatives in more than 30 years. Every single vote in the Senate will be important to Kavanaugh’s confirmation to the Supreme Court. In the coming weeks, we’ll learn more about Kavanaugh and follow the Senate’s developments in this important confirmation vote. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates

name: Mark
subject: 5 hours left to reach our goal!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Osmack for Missouri
body:
Dear Friends,

We are truly getting down to the wire with just a few hours left to meet our fundraising goal. I am so thankful for every single donation that has already come in. name: Jacqueline Burns
subject: Jessica Morse for Congress Campaign
body:
Hi Peter,

I wanted to reach out as I am the new organizer for Jessica's campaign in the Tahoe/Truckee region. This election is going to be critical for our district, and we could really use your help as we ramp up our efforts moving towards November. There are so many different ways you could support our efforts, so I hope to hear back from you! The first opportunity to help would be this weekend - we are doing canvassing in Truckee both Saturday and Sunday - and we will also be phone banking this Wednesday. Would you be able to join us this weekend or on Wednesday?

Feel free to email, call, or text anytime.

Best,

\--

Jackie Burns
Field Organizer
(612) 212-2779
[jacqueline@morse4congress.com](mailto:jacqueline@morse4congress.com)

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: No matter who we're up against, we know what we're fighting for.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
In four days, we will have our official Republican opponent. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa927/34a064cc/bb51657/70f452d/2523325473/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends - Now is a critical moment for our campaign. In four days, we will have our Republican opponent. No matter who Team Abrams is up against next week, we know what we are fighting for: affordable health care and Medicaid expansion, excellent public schools, and a thriving, diverse economy that works for every family. We also know that Georgia's Republican establishment will stop at nothing to thwart that vision, and we need to be ready for whatever they throw our way. So I'm asking you: **[Can I count on you to make a donation to my campaign before the Republican runoff election on Tuesday?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa927/34a064cc/bb51657/70f452a/2523325473/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzIwMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-gop-runoff?refcode=IE072018-full")** Since launching in Albany, Georgia, last year, our people-powered movement hasn't stopped gaining momentum. We haven't stopped talking about the issues affecting Georgia families. And we will _never_ back down in the fight for our people. For the teacher going above and beyond for students despite their low pay. For the worker who picks up a late shift to make ends meet, who finds rest only on the bus to their second job. For the child who, unaware of their circumstances, truly believes that their future is limitless. And for their parents, who, hoping against hope, want to believe the same. **These are the people we are fighting for - and together, bit by bit, door by door, day by day, we are building a better state for them.** **[But I need your help. Will you make a donation today to show our opponent that we will never stop fighting for Georgia families?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa927/34a064cc/bb51657/70f452a/2523325473/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzIwMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-gop-runoff?refcode=IE072018-full")** I can't tell you who our Republican opponent will be, or what he'll throw at us next week. But this I know: If we remain focused on the issues, if we fight with all we've got for every family and reach out to every voter before November, we will win. We will make our vision - a state where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to thrive - Georgia's reality. Thank you for standing with me today. Sincerely, Stacey Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa927/34a064cc/bb51657/70f452a/2523325473/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzIwMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-gop-runoff?refcode=IE072018-full")**

|
---

-_The Wall Street Journal_ This week, President Donald J. Trump signed an executive order to “prioritize and expand workforce development so that we can create and fill American jobs with American workers,” Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump writes. “It is time to deliver better workforce training so that all Americans have the chance to move into better jobs and earn bigger paychecks,” Ms. Trump says.
## [‘Best Professor.’ ‘Very Evenhanded.’ ‘Great Hair!’: Brett Kavanaugh, as Seen by His Law Students](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIwLjkyODA0NTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMC45MjgwNDU2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU2MjQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/new-york-times-best-professor-evenhanded-great-hair-brett-kavanaugh-seen-law-students/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr)
-_The New York Times_ “Anonymous evaluations of professors by their students can be caustic or catty. But they are also unfailingly candid,” Adam Liptak writes. “In 12 sets of evaluations spanning 700 pages, there was almost only glowing praise for Judge Kavanaugh’s teaching. More than a few students said he was the most impressive law school professor they had encountered.”
## [Employers Commit to Train 3.8 Million Workers Under Trump Executive Order](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIwLjkyODA0NTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMC45MjgwNDU2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU2MjQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.kyma.com/news/politics/employers-commit-to-train-38-million-workers-under-trump-executive-order/770473013)
-CNN “A group of business leaders have committed to train 3.8 million workers with in-demand job skills over the next five years under an executive order on job creation signed by President Donald Trump Thursday,” Katie Lobosco reports. The executive order also establishes the National Council for the American Worker, which will develop “a national strategy to train Americans for the skills they need.”
## [Rand Paul: Trump Is Right to Meet Putin](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIwLjkyODA0NTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMC45MjgwNDU2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU2MjQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.politico.com/magazine/story/2018/07/16/trump-is-right-to-meet-putin-219012)
-_Politico Magazine_ “America needs fewer enemies. What’s wrong with reducing tensions?” Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY) asks after the left criticized President Trump’s meeting with Russian leader Vladimir Putin. “I am thankful that Trump is once again willing to go against the political elite in Washington and keep the lines of communication to Moscow open.”
## [Victims of ‘Trump Derangement Syndrome’ Land in ICU After Putin Freakout – Here’s My Prescription](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIwLjkyODA0NTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMC45MjgwNDU2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU2MjQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&http://www.foxnews.com/opinion/2018/07/18/victims-trump-derangement-syndrome-land-in-icu-after-putin-freakout-heres-my-prescription.html)
-Fox News “Sadly, the media had little interest in delving into important issues that Presidents Trump and Putin discussed, including nuclear nonproliferation, destroying ISIS, ending the civil war in Syria, preventing Iran from building atomic bombs, and the security of Israel,” David Bossie writes. “Reporters could barely acknowledge the positive sight of former Cold War adversaries talking about peace.” [**Trump’s Aluminum Tariffs Restore a Crucial Industry and Protect American Jobs**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIwLjkyODA0NTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMC45MjgwNDU2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU2MjQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/op-eds/trumps-aluminum-tariffs-restore-a-crucial-industry-and-protect-american-jobs) -_Washington Examiner_ Despite sour predictions, America’s economy is booming since President Trump implemented steel and aluminum tariffs, industry executives Jesse Gary and Bob Prusak write. “American aluminum workers can feel confident that Trump will continue to stand up to countries that cheat as we work together to create more American jobs and revitalize the American aluminum industry,” they explain. [**We Must Close the Skills Gap to Secure Our Future**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIwLjkyODA0NTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMC45MjgwNDU2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU2MjQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&http://www.foxnews.com/opinion/2018/07/19/must-close-skills-gap-to-secure-our-future.html) -Fox News “At Lockheed Martin, we are proud to answer the president’s call for comprehensive workforce development,” Lockheed Martin CEO Marillyn Hewson writes. “That’s why we are pledging to create 8,000 apprenticeship and workforce development opportunities over the next 5 years.” [**Help Is at Hand for Palestinians. It’s All up to Hamas.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIwLjkyODA0NTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMC45MjgwNDU2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU2MjQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/help-is-at-hand-for-palestinians--if-hamas-sets-them-free/2018/07/19/7262f224-8ac7-11e8-85ae-511bc1146b0b_story.html) -_The Washington Post_ “The nightmare of Hamas’s leadership is continuing and needlessly prolonging the suffering of the Palestinian people in Gaza,” write Senior Advisor to the President Jared Kushner, Special Representative for International Negotiations Jason Greenblatt, and U.S. Ambassador to Israel David Friedman. “Life could significantly improve in short order for the Palestinian people if Hamas allowed it.” [**Poll Favors Confirmation of Judge Brett Kavanaugh for Supreme Court**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIwLjkyODA0NTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMC45MjgwNDU2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU2MjQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/jul/18/poll-favors-confirmation-brett-kavanaugh-supreme-c/) -_The Washington Times_ Dave Boyer reports that “a plurality of voters supports the confirmation of Supreme Court nominee Judge Brett M. Kavanaugh, including nearly one in five Democrats,” according to a new Morning Consult/POLITICO survey. [**Trump Saves Taxpayers $1.4 Billion on Air Force One Contract**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIwLjkyODA0NTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMC45MjgwNDU2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU2MjQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&109&&&http://dailycaller.com/2018/07/18/trump-air-force-one/) -The Daily Caller “President Donald Trump has struck a deal with The Boeing Company for a new generation of two Air Force One aircrafts at a lower cost than originally proposed,” Saagar Enjeti reports. The deal saves taxpayers “over $1.4 billion from the initially proposed $5.3 billion cost-plus contract,” Press Secretary Sarah Sanders said.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIwLjkyODA0NTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMC45MjgwNDU2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU2MjQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&110&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIwLjkyODA0NTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMC45MjgwNDU2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU2MjQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&111&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzIwLjkyODA0NTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyMC45MjgwNDU2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU2MjQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&112&&&http://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/new?preferences=true)

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Call your senators
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Keep the calls coming! Already, hundreds of us around the country have called up our Senators to demand they stop Judge Brett Kavanaugh from being seated on the Supreme Court. If we're going to succee
#
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa02/bed43eb/610a5344/75fd5713/3231233896/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-kavanaugh/?source=em180720-suba")
Friends,
Keep the calls coming!
Already, hundreds of us around the country have called our Senators to demand they stop Judge Brett Kavanaugh from being seated on the Supreme Court. If we're going to succeed, we have to keep up the pressure on Congress from now until the vote.
When President Obama nominated Merrick Garland, Senate Republicans stood together to block his nomination. We need Democrats in the Senate to show that same resolve. If Democrats stand together, we can persuade Senators like Maine's Susan Collins and Alaska's Lisa Murkowski to stand with us.
[**Call your senators to STOP Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation. It will take hearing from hundreds of thousands of people like you for Congress to fight this fight.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa02/bed43eb/610a5344/75fd5713/3231233896/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-kavanaugh/?source=em180720-suba")
The most important job of the Supreme Court is to ensure equal protection under the law. We've seen attempts to chisel away at those protections, whether it be legalizing discrimination against LGBTQ individuals, infringing on a woman's right to make her own medical decisions, or banning Muslims from entering our country.
[**We can't let the Supreme Court move any further to the right. Call your senators now and demand they oppose Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa02/bed43eb/610a5344/75fd5713/3231233896/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-kavanaugh/?source=em180720-suba")
It won't be easy, but you have proven before that we can make our government listen. If we make our voices heard, we can sway enough senators to make the difference. We have done it before and we can do it again. So make your voice heard today.
**Tell your Senators to STOP Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation to the Supreme Court before it's too late.**
**[Call Your Senators](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa02/bed43eb/610a5344/75fd5713/3231233896/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-kavanaugh/?source=em180720-suba")**
Can't call right now? Consider donating to Our Revolution to help us continue the important work of organizing our grassroots momentum to protect the Supreme Court. You can contribute here:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-scotus](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa02/bed43eb/610a5344/75fd5712/3231233896/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-scotus?refcode=em180720-suba")
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa02/bed43eb/610a5344/75fd571d/3231233896/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa02/bed43eb/610a5344/75fd571c/3231233896/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa02/bed43eb/610a5344/75fd571f/3231233896/VEsO/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa02/bed43eb/610a5344/75fd571e/3231233896/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: Stand for life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
The most important thing a legislator can do is protect our fundamental rights. And for me, as a nurse whose job is to save lives, that includes.....

Friend,

The most important thing a legislator can do is protect our fundamental rights.

And for me, as a nurse whose job is to save lives, that includes protecting the rights of the unborn. I am 100% pro-life and believe that life needs to be defended at every stage.

I am proud to have the endorsement of Wisconsin Right to Life and Wisconsin Family Action, a 100% rating from Pro-Life Wisconsin and the support of pro-life advocates all over our state.

[JOIN US TO STAND FOR LIFE >>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ac21c7f6276246e79d599c6c6ab3015d&_e=oHT9QDvAyc5M7Ji3RDEGgKf0jdXl31LMgxapjXHCdWv2DzD5WgUDpjapw7RaNytBbibGQ642Xqlt9sU_wliDAqpNnfd0jhTEICqzVCpywcjBt1IJvuYaBMThgyuKd5Ez9H6q9f7i32RPUTttSPllhBAUpqMby5-4qSzGbzEbtQuR6cDyiSgYZ39KPuzjbDKXX2aMny8-Wf6nFURk9Py6RhT3oOvujXgC0JK-NtYRCytZefmcWh7KxopKIN6XJ00vpLml3C4QC4Ji_Fh3Owt7plkCQ_jQiu1JYmc9ua3ExYNKTXbLgqY-kI3Aeup_DRgu1GnKah1Wjw1Qnb0iiO5AAEb38OSPFV5FG2S26FZT47f_VtVzKvwxgG2OGZ1yTVtMfYlc9ql2vY0ieWeBnBcMH42jdFhFMtz0cBcZwsrRzDQ%3D)
---

Here’s what people have to say about my pro-life record:

"In our caucus debate [about the ban of sale of fetal baby body parts], Leah was one of only a few voices who spoke up with me to defend the precious unborn. Sadly, a few senators who say they’re pro-life on the campaign trail stayed silent. Even worse, some fought against this bill. Not Leah. **Leah was adamant that we should follow through on our campaign promises and vote to protect life.”** — [Sen. Terry Moulton](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ac21c7f6276246e79d599c6c6ab3015d&_e=oHT9QDvAyc5M7Ji3RDEGgBeJH1EjYunt7NRlCsNmdN5TMBCT_7SVkmAxQG9UiSyWF6vi4Rc26SrmIHwMRPm1X3aLixap7lWhcrtXFEMCs70SG8SNx84CUzlfy1vODmjGrqPvMHFZnImjix1aSG_0UT89H2n3iaFDP-laHt2gUVFIKoNTFTdQm3Ol3I7bChRKoR2-K8E_85YIMmZ7FGB1kv43s8agXuh_jxj6o55kGbGDoYCzS_81tlGRO7mjENSVr9z8q603QqdIbj05RAjzPvVokBU_CMFi_3cNE9sbQbeN5SRatGS6TFjeJef2W70wEB03TB3YJJxYQY6NDbTaYg%3D%3D)

**"There’s only one candidate running for U.S. Senate that has been an ardent advocate for the rights of the unborn throughout their entire life**. Leah Vukmir is that candidate, and she’s earned my steadfast support for U.S. Senate.” — [Rep. André Jacque](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ac21c7f6276246e79d599c6c6ab3015d&_e=oHT9QDvAyc5M7Ji3RDEGgBeJH1EjYunt7NRlCsNmdN594tbOPlLMgohy-hx3VdiL62KVkaKsfK3qGnsJIhZerFWlgC4PAuetIPrZq3KD-HQuSNQuT5bOX3vLieJOti90YpZ8EVlbnePd2wKuKBHNVZ0Yu7uXZWQ_5GAIDVhmvB2iTciT3pwXEWj7WZ260qri4me7Zjmgy1i44Dn0WGHxj-LOqEPi9gs-TkE1y9mtCPlWPT2Z8eKKsBJH3ByEur8lgu2H_3RxoI4CBH74Qc9zVzWENugalweWHFSgwe5U25Gsb_WvkXUIOdVGArYSD7In)

**“....if ever there was an issue that differentiated the two candidates, Vukmir and Nicholson, I would think pro-life would be one of them.** Given the fact that Nicholson’s own campaign can’t produce anything, in his life, that he has ever done that was pro-life before he declared his campaign for the Senate.” — [Mark Belling](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ac21c7f6276246e79d599c6c6ab3015d&_e=oHT9QDvAyc5M7Ji3RDEGgOEjwSzrS17O8wSP2lxYg0JnMFzga-P41-_4AMLgzaS0FkztSGLYMb8WICgOwLJ8fvhQEPGKsloAyb4f56DYMu461Qehmd7atBWe3Z8dTNL2t2U7oWQOIsvRTtqnqlIOr_LSltjJzdGwX9MrPg5z4zBQMxLFMBa6pm4iS0Vn4HNt96ni1qBxmgwts5y9hZU2Ixgsk9IKpbK1pQjBPWCIO3mWZXZULu7V2AF7Fg6N-BWcu5t2DxzgwZ4CTL7tPtlqYqaqN8HOMP80prQ66x0-ZMh_t1JiHP65aTI0DE8EfNobqYg7zyA3JX2VLc6n52zjDGa2hw1CzD3jvN1ZikkzEOa4zlvqm8NNhyFfGpVvEkojX3C3eT8-xsyCMsFqv7deNA%3D%3D)

**"Leah will be a senator who strives to represent all of Wisconsin — including the unborn who have no voice**. I’m proud to back her as she runs for Senate and I would encourage you to do so, too.” — [Sen. Devin LeMahieu](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ac21c7f6276246e79d599c6c6ab3015d&_e=oHT9QDvAyc5M7Ji3RDEGgBeJH1EjYunt7NRlCsNmdN61cBHFyVqYUquXQKI-z9dSHK8Mx888c5rgGsln_mT1xR7IihI-WCfMer-XXXEY2Yh0PWSAytXMJU2Uia2ZVLOBPsAIljADFN14g9mNQAPhBwC9bxt2gCvdrov1hlZ-NBuZT746G0hB-opj8Vvgo95Ib9-TfZJD692-QYDSbw1JooIdTqqQ9SsswjAvxkltlZF_ZxLvlXhg7j9nO1k6mwbaI5aqwPvGIclsCBvkdO1eJEpVuyIsZFyFeqjjh1lQuXx_5E3id3qFCLhZX54dv293)

[STAND UP FOR THE UNBORN >>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ac21c7f6276246e79d599c6c6ab3015d&_e=oHT9QDvAyc5M7Ji3RDEGgKf0jdXl31LMgxapjXHCdWv2DzD5WgUDpjapw7RaNytBbibGQ642Xqlt9sU_wliDAqpNnfd0jhTEICqzVCpywcjBt1IJvuYaBMThgyuKd5Ez9H6q9f7i32RPUTttSPllhBAUpqMby5-4qSzGbzEbtQuR6cDyiSgYZ39KPuzjbDKXpG4TxlaIOQ4ofFxmyInlPcx1-Z6k35CJiPIKPm9DfbuoLl2K-PyCPDdH3zD1jXGrdgCHVUMt--SWHIgCb5q-3dsvSbNGblYX_4QD01nmT9hJAt-xBp12yXexL8htIndXmrS-sJSRBpr725dXxDR8taiDcQJDTXjk-jF7x_vAg283IDHc6ScNqY0_w9jVwDJ8le6nvhsg_HiaVVunvei5Ch_0wgJUWtG4WX-zIryNSUA%3D)
---

Friend, too many politicians have buckled under the pressure of the abortion lobby.

They won't speak out against abortion. They'll even defend Planned Parenthood!

But Friend, I've proven that I will always support the unborn, and I’ll never sacrifice my beliefs to win over donors or political elites.

I'm honored to have the support of the pro-life community and I look forward to continue our hard work fighting for the lives of the unborn as your senator!

I hope you'll stand for life with me today by adding your name to my Stand For Life petition: **[https://leahvukmir.com/stand-for-life/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ac21c7f6276246e79d599c6c6ab3015d&_e=oHT9QDvAyc5M7Ji3RDEGgKf0jdXl31LMgxapjXHCdWv2DzD5WgUDpjapw7RaNytBbibGQ642Xqlt9sU_wliDAqpNnfd0jhTEICqzVCpywcjBt1IJvuYaBMThgyuKd5Ez9H6q9f7i32RPUTttSPllhBAUpqMby5-4qSzGbzEbtQuR6cDyiSgYZ39KPuzjbDKX_5ODgZePFglVUK1U5YHkilzR4Hr4F9JPJZCY_Ida0EW4fUFJDmpcWIkKPwKGYwwp_qGtHWP5TFTzyBeeQYvXNDl2IEfLXQmr4K_Hqk-z81u384BR42Mi46ysLNlfUGCoYYI5NFtrh6EeV6nbaDZssUyXWbeEc8nuC8s8rZc7QPc56luqlUvV2jHmYl9yr3U5427vvucPP28YiJUBC7Twu7FPjyqZAgCkcOBDr4OSNME%3D)**

Thank you, Friend.

Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ac21c7f6276246e79d599c6c6ab3015d&_e=oHT9QDvAyc5M7Ji3RDEGgGnqCqYp8SdD0BPNP_I9wkGMOanWv1OZmqvRgEIromhKrI6CRMjvekoFEagCyHdha9XekV_ItFJb6OSN7Mt2fh-x-_mW35-9xVeg6ni8gLODK3g4Co3tntpsf8VN1oN_qNLUtUHq_oIU0nBeR82JxKwo-faAOW5YIph97oH2rOPQJ8N81qzeBChibWv6xz6iMS9xyB6iVegBIYzToyYVXSCAdro0ndXerT92pa3_SiwNlCo2HkQe3-tzXqy__0Y8tQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ac21c7f6276246e79d599c6c6ab3015d&_e=oHT9QDvAyc5M7Ji3RDEGgHHAeHlSpAocqpCDPBcrfrsfZyExNNswR0c1hiLGAM7WuUex3sC5H2nKa4WBEOJrwMT7-VWjpUM-_Hlqg_RzjT3d0q8-4CgQ1CxnBUSHVpX3HUaQ1vfC4tfjk-pY9oUSQYToUG64lKtZyuox1Va1YoHsETfKUkEuLynPkmx5zuxX3HFjZCvdHu9lDjewLUeyMdnGfvEzZLkPL6dU4JNkSXOCsz8cQEnuUO35vZsbKosGEqh7JFuFdxxyntEBk-XX8g%3D%3D)
Paid for by Leah for Senate

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ac21c7f6276246e79d599c6c6ab3015d&_e=tqZt9Fqb5-pNmfRN4mqmgpd2owkIgpLLw_vT5ld2bnb0a88NwFgOFuHKIWUITfDHlRHMoe-meUNq6v_jEp7IJlSKShG8EwGWkcjvwfA4ImoDkMAyfyA08rEhPhgRWAlSU2xbbTBUoJqhXPQ9NVy4gM-eSgxSHy5pWVtBn04rinQylFIEgDYd6AvFhHWpUiRFprxay594qWwBnfwXa8Pmy5m_2QiL6Exu2xhA7YkBRSeVLFvH4cl67g2JjUTzUZKO). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ac21c7f6276246e79d599c6c6ab3015d&_e=oHT9QDvAyc5M7Ji3RDEGgPgCjp6c6KbX8tCp4AuxunUs0MElm4eoUSxGVGk33cvqlJHKjLkeEzhh5vWiYYBtSKq71fXWkcoSKwdI1r7gxKKiymjIj8aVaCIctbZjehnHA6MqVZ7DKQ2o-5i_Pg1Tv0mKabOCCBiRdDGDDeUb1mXzgxZrcyNBV2bN5GycpAHNY93cytg2AHaFf-jftvcqEZbybPLE24tLc8sgUVPu4zD2o1GRY1Kdh1JDv3w_0qDdPn3-u4QHiEqj0KqslMxuO1I2O9vUlKFe-zHlgJsDlwo_lWvcPtLuQOhEenKiC8paE4Uk4Pu8jVZEAKMdbizV2eMirryJnhlLFNriVKrZ4bmraIAFb8IlJydAjfzvcHcx) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ac21c7f6276246e79d599c6c6ab3015d&_e=oHT9QDvAyc5M7Ji3RDEGgPgCjp6c6KbX8tCp4AuxunWJokJeyS95iCZ3eBEX8z4OpTtNs9xKno_05xZ439SdSTB9OTwnpzZFBOvew08guN1jkWKEzWf9gOwF8nUXWIpBxiO3vST3i4sGnVl7BJ1lmUwVOIXxNZyrYiGXWfuofUwQRpKdfVdGefvTG-NVO37bj98t30sKm18DqUvBJJIzlyqlNFg1gL_eTnZyUVjg3u_BVoYLw0vgVpeZm1vSMaUuFuLiQVsgyMXAax-YoxTX5rOSN9548LvaD1hmrIiYdHSpeFsIWZI0eCS7ZmkyEkJI7ibQKcgz5avKaWJpIAlNevZEC-UjAi7qXKPCBoSTWuZ9EEMY93-16kC4vEvpF6V2) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? clean_body: The most important thing a legislator can do is protect our fundamental rights. And for me, as a nurse whose job is to save lives, that includes..... Friend, The most important thing a legislator can do is protect our fundamental rights. And for me, as a nurse whose job is to save lives, that includes protecting the rights of the unborn. I am 100% pro-life and believe that life needs to be defended at every stage. I am proud to have the endorsement of Wisconsin Right to Life and Wisconsin Family Action, a 100% rating from Pro-Life Wisconsin and the support of pro-life advocates all over our state. Here’s what people have to say about my pro-life record: "In our caucus debate [about the ban of sale of fetal baby body parts], Leah was one of only a few voices who spoke up with me to defend the precious unborn. Sadly, a few senators who say they’re pro-life on the campaign trail stayed silent. Even worse, some fought against this bill. Not Leah. Leah was adamant that we should follow through on our campaign promises and vote to protect life.” — "There’s only one candidate running for U.S. Senate that has been an ardent advocate for the rights of the unborn throughout their entire life. Leah Vukmir is that candidate, and she’s earned my steadfast support for U.S. Senate.” — “....if ever there was an issue that differentiated the two candidates, Vukmir and Nicholson, I would think pro-life would be one of them. Given the fact that Nicholson’s own campaign can’t produce anything, in his life, that he has ever done that was pro-life before he declared his campaign for the Senate.” — "Leah will be a senator who strives to represent all of Wisconsin — including the unborn who have no voice. I’m proud to back her as she runs for Senate and I would encourage you to do so, too.” — Friend, too many politicians have buckled under the pressure of the abortion lobby. They won't speak out against abortion. They'll even defend Planned Parenthood! But Friend, I've proven that I will always support the unborn, and I’ll never sacrifice my beliefs to win over donors or political elites. I'm honored to have the support of the pro-life community and I look forward to continue our hard work fighting for the lives of the unborn as your senator! I hope you'll stand for life with me today by adding your name to my Stand For Life petition: Thank you, Friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: Andrew Cuomo heard us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Imagine what we can achieve with Attorney General Teachout.
#

Peter -
Our campaign is already making an impact. This week Governor Cuomo finally said he is willing to give the Attorney General's office a criminal referral to investigate the Trump Foundation.
This is a huge deal. With a criminal referral, it will be possible for the AG to **investigate Donald Trump and his family** for any criminal conduct discovered in connection to the Trump Foundation. That could lead to tax returns and indictments.
Zephyr called on Cuomo to do this weeks ago, and then again this week, standing outside Trump Tower, she called on him to act. Apparently he heard her this time. Hours later he made his announcement, and people noticed #TheZephyrEffect:
**" The Cuomo administration's offer of a criminal referral came after Zephyr Teachout...publicly demanded that Cuomo issue such a referral to Underwood's office." -- CNN**
If and when a criminal probe comes out of a Trump Foundation investigation, President Donald Trump may finally have to turn over his tax returns.
Zephyr did that. She pushed for this action because she knows that we're in the midst of a Constitutional crisis, and the New York Attorney General must do everything in her power to save our democracy and protect people from Trump and his cronies.
Zephyr will lead this fight as Attorney General, but she cannot do it alone. That's why she needs you, Peter:
**[Make a $3 donation right now to help power our campaign. The corrupt establishment has noticed our movement's growing strength, and they are likely to spend unlimited sums of money to stop #TheZephyrEffect. With your help, we will beat them.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e93/6e822e2f/1b80385f/41724a0a/3993871050/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MjAtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-july?refcode=em180720-full")**
This is a major win for the people, but it is just the first step. We need our next AG to continue this fight. We need her to use every available legal tool to get justice for the people. She must be fearless and completely independent -- willing to take on our country's most powerful and most corrupt family.
Zephyr is the only candidate who has actually pushed Andrew Cuomo to take action on behalf of the people. Imagine what we can achieve with Attorney General Teachout.
All our best,
Team Zephyr
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e93/6e822e2f/1b80385f/41724a0a/3993871050/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MjAtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-july?refcode=em180720-full")**

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. name: Tim Ryan
subject: My CNN op-ed: Marijuana should be legal in all 50 states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
We have ignored the social and economic toll of our marijuana laws for too long. | |
---
Friends, [I published an op-ed with CNN today in support of legalizing marijuana, and I wanted to be the first to tell you about it.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9223/5486deaa/299b7079/dcc5318/3863529608/VEsH/ "https://www.cnn.com/2018/07/20/opinions/legalize-marijuana-all-50-states-ryan/index.html") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9223/5486deaa/299b7079/dcc531b/3863529608/VEsE/ "http://www.cnn.com/2018/07/20/opinions/legalize-marijuana-all-50-states-ryan/index.html") **We have ignored the social and economic toll of our marijuana laws for too long. Marijuana should be legal in all 50 states. ** I believe no person should be sentenced to a lifetime of hardship because of a marijuana arrest. It is morally wrong, economically nonsensical, and an unnecessary strain on our already overworked law enforcement officials. Even more unjust is that the burden of these low-level drug charges falls on minority communities, hindering their God-given right to thrive and build a brighter future for themselves and their families. That is why I signed on to cosponsor the **Marijuana Justice Act, H.R. 4815.** The Bill: • Amends the Controlled Substances Act to remove marijuana from schedule I • Eliminates criminal penalties for possession and consumption of marijuana • Prohibits and reduces certain federal funds for a state without a statute legalizing marijuana, if the Bureau of Justice Assistance determines that such a state has a disproportionate arrest rate or disproportionate incarceration rate for marijuana offenses • Expunges convictions for marijuana use or possession • Sets up the Community Reinvestment Fund, a grant program to reinvest in communities most affected by the war on drugs [Please read the full op-ed and share to spread the word.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9223/5486deaa/299b7079/dcc531b/3863529608/VEsF/ "http://www.cnn.com/2018/07/20/opinions/legalize-marijuana-all-50-states-ryan/index.html") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9223/5486deaa/299b7079/dcc531b/3863529608/VEsC/ "http://www.cnn.com/2018/07/20/opinions/legalize-marijuana-all-50-states-ryan/index.html") We need to invest in a country that works for all Americans. We need every citizen working to keep America moving forward. **Instead, we are keeping one in five Americans in jail on low-level drug charges.** It isn't right. It must change. And Congress MUST change it. Thank you for standing with me. \-- Tim [DONATE ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9223/5486deaa/299b7079/dcc531a/3863529608/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_july18?refcode=em20180720_mjoped")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9223/5486deaa/299b7079/dcc531d/3863529608/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9223/5486deaa/299b7079/dcc531c/3863529608/VEsB/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")

# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |

Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9223/5486deaa/299b7079/dcc531d/3863529608/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Team Kaine
subject: Can we make a deal, Derek?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, this is it: We are counting down to Election Day.

By the numbers, that's:
* Less than 4 months,
* Or 109 days,
* Or even 2,616 hours.

**So we wanted to make a deal with you. Derek, are you all in?[Sign up today to pledge a recurring contribution to Tim Kaine's re-election from now until Election Day.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1202/3e0906/69181713/3e35f1bf/1654955646/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-recurring-fund?refcode=20180720_1_FR_TEAM_Recurring-LDND&amount=25&recurring=4&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Sign+up+today+to+pledge+a+recurring+cont&utm_campaign=20180720_1_FR_TEAM_Recurring-LDND&source=20180720_1_FR_TEAM_Recurring-LDND")**

Your monthly donation goes towards making sure that between now and [November 6th,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1202/3e0906/69181713/3e35f1be/1654955646/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-recurring-fund?refcode=20180720_1_FR_TEAM_Recurring-LDND&amount=25&recurring=4&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20180720_1_FR_TEAM_Recurring-LDND&source=20180720_1_FR_TEAM_Recurring-LDND") we are talking to every single voter and getting our message out over the airwaves.

It also serves as a message that every month, we are continuing to stand up to our opponent and his divisive message.

**The average recurring donation is $23, so that may be a good option for you, Derek. But ultimately, this is about what you want to give and the commitment you want to make to our campaign.**

[Any amount is an appreciated investment and proves that you're with Tim - and all Virginia Democrats - for the duration. Click here or a button below to let us know what you want to give monthly.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1202/3e0906/69181713/3e35f1bd/1654955646/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-recurring-fund?refcode=20180720_1_FR_TEAM_Recurring-LDND&amount=25&recurring=4&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Any+amount+is+an+appreciated+investment+&utm_campaign=20180720_1_FR_TEAM_Recurring-LDND&source=20180720_1_FR_TEAM_Recurring-LDND") Select a recurring amount: | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1202/3e0906/69181713/3e35f1bc/1654955646/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-recurring-fund?refcode=20180720_1_FR_TEAM_Recurring-LDND&amount=5&recurring=4&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180720_1_FR_TEAM_Recurring-LDND&source=20180720_1_FR_TEAM_Recurring-LDND")

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: Jacky beat the odds. Kyrsten's a tireless fighter. Help them both win >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4cb1/24c69fd9/27b3c24e8/18822614/3398539915/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES48N_digital_email_20180720_JackyKyrstenText_inact&source=WQEFES48N_digital_email_20180720_JackyKyrstenText_inact")
---

Peter,

We need to flip two seats to take back the Senate, and we've endorsed two pro-choice Democratic women to do it: Jacky Rosen (NV) and Kyrsten Sinema (AZ).

Here's why they're right for the job:
* Both candidates are running for vulnerable Republican-held seats.
* They both have a proven track record of fighting for women and families while serving in the House.

**[Donate $3 to help Jacky and Kyrsten flip the Senate and continue fighting for women and families.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4cb1/24c69fd9/27b3c24e8/18822615/3398539915/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180720_email_JackyKyrsten?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+Jacky+and+Kyrsten+flip+&utm_campaign=WQEFES48N_digital_email_20180720_JackyKyrstenText_inact&source=WQEFES48N_digital_email_20180720_JackyKyrstenText_inact")**

We didn't get behind just any Senate candidates -- we're all in for the exact right women for the job.

In spite of the millions the GOP spent against her in 2016, Jacky beat the odds to turn Nevada's 3rd Congressional District blue. While in the House, she introduced two bills to improve STEM education that were unanimously passed by the House as one combined bill. The Code Like a Girl Act funds computer science programs for girls under the age of 11.

We're proud to back Jacky in her bid to unseat Sen. Dean Heller -- the most vulnerable Senate Republican facing re-election in 2018.

Kyrsten is running for Republican Sen. Jeff Flake's open seat. Since she was elected in 2012, Kyrsten has been a tireless fighter for women and families. In 2013, she led the House freshmen in supporting the Violence Against Women Act, and as an advocate for veterans, she worked to ensure that military sexual assault survivors receive disability benefits.

Jacky and Kyrsten are the pro-choice champions we need in the Senate fighting for us.

**Donate $3 to help Jacky and Kyrsten turn red Senate seats blue:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Jacky-And-Kyrsten](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4cb1/24c69fd9/27b3c24e8/18822616/3398539915/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180720_email_JackyKyrsten?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectJackyAndKyr&utm_campaign=WQEFES48N_digital_email_20180720_JackyKyrstenText_inact&source=WQEFES48N_digital_email_20180720_JackyKyrstenText_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4cb1/24c69fd9/27b3c24e8/18822617/3398539915/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180720_email_JackyKyrsten?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFES48N_digital_email_20180720_JackyKyrstenText_inact&source=WQEFES48N_digital_email_20180720_JackyKyrstenText_inact")

|

body:
Tom is THE MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the ENTIRE HOUSE, so the far-right is DESPERATE to unseat him.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d63388d/1a8421e1/1a4e2f52d/485e41b9/2391280296/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")

_This just in:_**A super PAC is dropping** _**$50,000**_**to boost one of Tom 's far-right opponents.** This is just the beginning, team. Tom is THE MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the ENTIRE HOUSE, so the far-right is DESPERATE to unseat him, and you can bet that tons of outside money is going to pour into our district attacking us. **We may not have super PACs dropping $50,000 for us -- _but we do have you._ And if every member of this grassroots team pitches in with just $5, we'll take them on.** [**Can you make a donation of $5 right now so we can compete with the far-right 's super PAC money? **](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.20_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

Team, let's be clear: This super PAC is swooping into Arizona to prop up one of Tom's opponents because the far-right knows Tom is an independent voice -- not a partisan rubber stamp.

_Special interests want to replace Tom because he can 't be bought and sold -- he'll always put the interests of Arizona families first._

**But that 's exactly why we need to send Tom back to Congress. And no amount of super PAC money -- not even $50,000 -- can change that.**

**[CHIP IN today to fight back against the far-right and their super PACs>>](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.20_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Thanks,

Team O'Halleran

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.20_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. name: Campaign Manager Stacy Schuster
subject: NEW POLL: Dead Heat!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
If you've been following the race, you've seen the polls closing. A Gravis Marketing poll released this week revealed that we're in a dead heat with S | |
---
|
---
Friends -

If you've been following the race, you've seen the polls closing. A [**Gravis Marketing poll**](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=c6abe98508df40958134f657b73d2307&_e=a3St52qQ97Cy2JcsVwewcHMpQrI1LobRYOtjEZY-k8-Ij7vyRcEA_KKi3tkHyFCtOZYTE5bHLz9wK4WeNkJsXzbgANKlP8vaCrwOi8IHERZcirS_YUs9Hk-cxZc5Rk9sKBOWfpi8ykRZy8P5wQ6ILqmm3e0f55DKpUhuG9D5Vyfi09QG0zIIo3Dk6pRn-DQ7CEGE1LKQokuyWKnRicBaR6FvoiHR16Ai75FcMnoqcmsHHHm2gnORWqKHuNpbymdGvM4dI9UK9wJ_ubVBF9IUhhaKSSZWc_dptRTGmFOJeWkLr7mnP0GxSXLdmRbcrPvRGmYPfqPg99Iv_QWhd4jdlaZQ7AdWymlIxV4moHy3jMLR3ERtM0qAb_dviqz540b17-D8CIXQz-FWPQFhOrTag9aGdSCJF-aRZELUJkUMFwk%3D) released this week revealed that we're in a dead heat with Senator Menendez — 43 to 41. More than half of voters say that Menendez’s ethics troubles — violating federal law, abusing his office, and taking $1 million in illegal gifts — are impacting their decision.

_“Menendez, a two-term senator and former congressman, is only leading Republican challenger Bob Hugin, a former Marine, veteran and business leader, two percentage points, according to a Gravis Marketing poll released Monday evening. That is, notably, down two percentage points from May, when a[**Fairleigh Dickinson University poll**](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=c6abe98508df40958134f657b73d2307&_e=x2qFzGKVYxiQ9wZVFHke3WC283Pt8ddGca6czn5o2xvtCu0o5wNK0CHrM09asKxO0MG9vc_L72bE4qh632JnX6EDD3Pl48hvN5_HzYgUax8EHD3Grmdw5vXcNNo7jCgYakw1fDinvgT9bEGBAB6AUcckH1Jux9kidrbEcITe2KCq25le2fcRIhW0GoC7GvcXN_iYqI8mWW71q2-pC1JKC9H7ZXlX5ipX2NAeXAqBJNZ1HB4D5TRTAL7f4WqIAZYkF9oYWxHxNr-qkETdLIgjw3qunAC547WtlZqf2qLYCuLUiOcgR8ySiSVDAvLU_IUKyaiId06LD7gtdT1mweux2ZTWOwvCJTfdsQG0sMux82oAETn_bmKUCYWDfdvAp8QE) pegged Menendez lead at only four percentage points.” (Robert Donachie, Daily Caller, **[Menendez Chances of Re-election Looking Slimmer](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=c6abe98508df40958134f657b73d2307&_e=2asWFg0kv64Y1bwjG1zr_q4WNO5PgzdLLDPm-3Ejx3XMN-QAUJhvQHx31jI1IpSaKWErld_xawyJ_-eBZ5_Hmhs7U8L_UlN1rdn1D7MgHrF5LdWnJgVUqStP8zPEfJI22OE414R9egmhee3GfkgsL9j6kcEQlwN5pgfv9hVED38GVLZPwHJbwMEUoYDvxdH6gFTp1j7eDdmpchhLsSlG3tuQ_1D9qZ21xx0ggqq8r4jp70b-6uu-Zq3rm9lEvy3-IzAmsExyVCJYQzzwrVUH2rBgDWusb0b1YM9iIMoEsDwbPL6Rwc3NHbfx-nXQN1YRYAlDRAzufECDwAvZvGZDy03MViiP-kDYLOyqLhTOPZV2Pe8UVk_AEm4umeajhA_CbUZg7aK8beLikhyUt2C_0H0YBAkVOIDHSUH7IIOlU5Q%3D)** , 07/17/18)_

We've seen tremendous movement in the race in the past four months — from being down 17 points to closing the gap to just 2. Even the media is taking notice.

clean_body: | | | I need your help, friends: My campaign is up against the wealthy corporations bankrolling Governor Chris Sununu, including private prison companies getting rich off of the detention of families. And here's the thing: I'm refusing to take any money from corporations because special interests have been placed above hardworking New Hampshire families for too long. That's why this news is HUGE: A generous group of donors just offered to MATCH every donation, dollar for dollar, to help us hit our $15,000 match goal. We can't afford to miss this rare opportunity, so I need grassroots donors like you to give $5 or more right now - and get your gift DOUBLED to win in New Hampshire and defeat the Trump/Sununu agenda: Please, friends, time is running out: "" If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thank you, Molly | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Delivering Results
body:
During the natural flow of an election year, it's important that we always remember the reason why we're all involved in politics. |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Delivering Results_** During a busy election year like this one, it's important that we always remember the reason why we're involved in politics. For me, I'm involved because I enjoy helping the great people who are making a real difference in the lives of Hoosiers and in the future of our state.

And here in Indiana, there's so many great examples that inspire me to work harder each and every day for our Republican team.

For example, in the news lately you might have seen that:
* **Governor Eric Holcomb** is helping make Indiana's schools safer by providing metal detector wands to every Indiana school that wants them.
* **Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** is working to expand broadband access across the state, especially in rural area.
* **Secretary of State Connie Lawson** is helping educate Hoosiers on how to protect themselves against investment fraud.
* **Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** is helping make it easier for Hoosier with disabilities to save for future expenses.
* **Auditor Tera Klutz** is helping make it easier for Hoosiers to watch over their state government finances with updates to the Indiana Transparency Portal.

These are just a few recent updates on our Governor, Lt. Governor and our 2018 statewide team, but the same pattern is also true for Republican officials in communities throughout Indiana. As Republicans, we've built a long, proven track record of providing real results for Hoosiers.

Because of the work of our local, congressional and statewide-elected Republicans, Indiana is receiving global attention as a great place to live, work and play. And through this team's continued work, I know our future will only continue to grow brighter.

-Kyle

P.S. In case you missed it, news broke today that the 2020 Republican National Convention [will be held in Charlotte, North Carolina](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=86dbed9231&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

_Photo: Chairman Kyle Hupfer joins Indiana Auditor Tera Klutz, Indiana Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Princeton Mayor Brad Schmitt, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch, First Lady Janet Holcomb, Governor Eric Holcomb, 4th District congressional nominee State Rep. Jim Baird, and 6th District congressional nominee Greg Pence on Tuesday night for Team Holcomb's G.O.Party!_
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
| **_Bringing Indiana to the World_**
**Governor Eric Holcomb** always says that one of his top jobs as our governor is to take Indiana to the world, and to bring the world to Indiana. And this week he definitely delivered on that promise!

It started at IU last weekend, when he attended an event hosted by global tech firm Infosys, which is opening a new hub at the former Indianapolis International Airport terminal (where the company plans to create 3,000 great new Hoosier jobs!). The global firm [brought nearly 600 teachers to Indiana](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=63a62fc29b&e=1acd9bb3d6) to learn about computer science, and Governor Holcomb was there to tell them all about Indiana!

But as a global center for business, it's not just tech firms like Infosys that are doing big things in Indiana.

That's why on Thursday, Governor Holcomb was there with Japan-based manufacturing giant Nippon Steel and Sumikin Cold Heading Wire, as [the company officially opened](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f6421f2496&e=1acd9bb3d6) its new $50 million, 150,000-square-foot facility in Shelbyville, where it's creating 70 new jobs for Hoosiers.

What a great week to be a Hoosier, as companies from around the world continue to choose Indiana!
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
|
---
| **_Mike Braun Endorsed By National Right to Life!_**
U.S. Senate candidate **Mike Braun** had a busy week, which included a big endorsement and a fact check that unequivocally found that Braun is telling the truth in one of his latest ads.

In case you missed it, yesterday **Mike Braun** officially [received an endorsement](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8fe23e068f&e=1acd9bb3d6) from National Right to Life! The organization's president said that, "Indiana voters who are concerned with the right to life and with the protection of the most vulnerable among us should vote for Mike Braun in November."

And then [a new fact check](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4cdfc3c194&e=1acd9bb3d6) from ABC 57 in South Bend found that Mike Braun's latest ad -- which says that Braun's company pays a starting wage that's nearly double the minimum wage -- is TRUE! [Watch the ad now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1a286c3323&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| | **_National Week of Action_**
---
|
---
| **_Sign Up for the National Week of Action!_**
Next weekend, get ready for the launch of the next National Week of Action!

From July 27-July 31, Hoosiers will be making calls, knocking on doors, and talking to their neighbors about Mike Braun and our entire 2018 statewide team! The voter contact we do now is critical to helping build the support we’ll need to deliver victories up and down the ballot in November.

Democrat Donnelly [was just ranked](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=61a1e96d54&e=1acd9bb3d6) as the most vulnerable Senate Democrat up for re-election this year...which makes the work we do this summer even more critical!

**\-- > Sign-up [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a94f565d0a&e=1acd9bb3d6)**, and we’ll get you plugged in to make a difference in your community next weekend!
---
|
---
| | **_Apply for the Lugar Series!_**
---
|
---
| **_Lugar Series Applications Still Open!_**
Are you a female looking to get more involved in your community? Or do you know someone who is? There’s still time to apply to join the 2018-2019 class of the Richard G. Lugar Excellent in Public Service Series!

The Lugar Series is a distinguished leadership training course that prepares women for public service, with 20 women selected each year to join this eight-month program that concludes with a four-day trip to Washington, D.C.

Applications must be postmarked by August 1, so start completing your application [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7c455755ec&e=1acd9bb3d6) today!
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[July 21](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c2fbc5f6fd&e=1acd9bb3d6): Buck Garden Party [July 26](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=44882ba5b2&e=1acd9bb3d6): Kosciusko County 2nd Annual Bob Sanders Golf Scramble
[July 30](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=79ef0befcd&e=1acd9bb3d6): Hancock County General Election Candidate Meeting
---
|
---
| _**News You Can Use**_ **Governor Eric Holcomb**[appoints new Indiana Court of Appeals judge](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8b5b444bce&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[works to extend broadband for rural residents](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4a34927f43&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Connie Lawson **[is touring the state to educate Hoosiers about investment fraud](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=342070ded9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell**[is working to help Hoosiers with disabilities save](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c785a6ecea&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz** [is helping make state government more transparent](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dbf22a7b28&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Superintendent Jennifer McCormick** [released standards on new ethnic studies course](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b9cffc8751&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[met with President Trump's U.S. Supreme Court nominee Judge Brett Kavanaugh](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e7c2b88604&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski**[talks about the coordinated effort to fight the drug epidemic](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=953157298c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks** [will lead House panel to watch over $16 billion VA technology upgrade](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e4355d8c64&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Todd Rokita** [supports President Trump's new workforce development initiative](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d99772116d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks** [is working to protect the nation against public health emergencie](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e32c3f2632&e=1acd9bb3d6)[s](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3f6b697e9b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Luke Messer**[thanks his interns for their hard work this summer](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d08137257b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon** [votes to help small businesses gain access to capital](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3678585360&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth** [is empowering confidence to invest in growing American companies](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bf4a4d8417&e=1acd9bb3d6)

subject: Your Weekly Republican Newsletter
