**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, JULY 20th**
|
---
**_A Note From Wayne_**
Dear Derek,

I just had a great time at the Summer Republican National Committee Meeting in Austin, Texas. The RNC continues to break fundraising and voter contact records, and our RNC Team in-state is gearing up for a successful 2018 election cycle.

Next week, [the RNC is having their National Week of Action](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyCyDEPa-2FYowlhKPv8ljgruvgswpJ30-2FW1EUGNPQ768Zf_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MHcVmoPezsqf8F01QcMS17TP9-2BTatmoq4pdWajqvPrreIEOg-2B7osw2BGcfnUNvnOkYgyI9isQrI3kAXK4I4JYrXk6CPAyebHugoyb0wrXpfG-2BBOKRcsDC52OQ2MEUlvN4bFE2K1J3ShIpUMN0SMplv5l688T6ArO8c0IM6BmaemWOvsx1kIEzcLny0VMSJwsslK27-2BbmSfLKTDs2NlbkqWiVWbTbYpJzQNXrKprLjiS-2BATpvwSC5p5TtQcXCvvvbLdi0e3Dzk4GL4wqecvLnG4w-3D-3D), and they are organizing with locations across New Hampshire to contact Republican voters.

We started this week with a great crowd at the Victory office opening, located right on the Londonderry and Derry town line. People there were energized and excited, and it was great to connect with all of them.

It's truly a great time to be a New Hampshire Republican, but the stakes couldn't be higher this November. [Read my latest Op-Ed on how either Democrat running for Governor would lead to tax increases in the Granite State.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbY1qiyT3HuRDH6pVWPAnYR68FCZ1ORcmaqVtkCxJzc4Ub3Xm1n3PIT3EwwY39cy4iThTKBSfEYbJ1Akmam8TI081FuIXRDKjvG8sDDg2Ri9EVl9GuEGY2mh-2BJ6A1RhVy-2F8RaRGCCYvtaNDaee4DuttA-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MHcVmoPezsqf8F01QcMS17TP9-2BTatmoq4pdWajqvPrreIEOg-2B7osw2BGcfnUNvnOkYgyI9isQrI3kAXK4I4JYrVySpe-2B-2FG8ykya5PI8rMHrtisuAdAa2-2Fh-2B6x-2FRmUYYlhcqRbMQfHmP667hqkbgs9Mb70lgDQGCj7hPAW1jojpiRQxTfFD61MR-2Fo0ZtsKbsqO3NO8lQhsDmWIRivdmKR2OZTfPzvYUIVTfNgP-2FsWajXsBFV6z9XXwYRs0-2FEKIMjC7vOgdc4mkuhlDGr1gKjTkyg-3D-3D)

Together, New Hampshire Republicans are going to lead and win at the polls this November - but we need **YOU** to be involved in the fight in order to get us there.

Sincerely,

Wayne MacDonald

**REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT**
Our spotlight this week shines on Stephen Meyers of Jaffrey. Sadly, Stephen passed away on July 15.

_"Steve had two favorite sports: politics and baseball. As founder and President of SCM Associates, a Republican direct-response fundraising firm, and founder of Granite Lists, a list management company, he was proud to be involved in many high-profile campaigns beginning with Pete duPont's run for President and including Mitt Romney's campaigns for Governor, President and Senator; Scott Walker and Charlie Baker's Gubernatorial campaigns and Speaker Ryan's campaigns to name a very few. President Ronald Reagan was his hero."_

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, JULY 20th | A Note From Wayne Dear Derek, I just had a great time at the Summer Republican National Committee Meeting in Austin, Texas. The RNC continues to break fundraising and voter contact records, and our RNC Team in-state is gearing up for a successful 2018 election cycle. Next week, , and they are organizing with locations across New Hampshire to contact Republican voters. We started this week with a great crowd at the Victory office opening, located right on the Londonderry and Derry town line. People there were energized and excited, and it was great to connect with all of them. It's truly a great time to be a New Hampshire Republican, but the stakes couldn't be higher this November. Together, New Hampshire Republicans are going to lead and win at the polls this November - but we need YOU to be involved in the fight in order to get us there. Sincerely, Wayne MacDonald Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. NHGOP Raffle! #FireTheIntern Digital Ad PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHT UPCOMING EVENTS PHOTO OF THE WEEK Our Victory office is open in Londonderry! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our spotlight this week shines on Stephen Meyers of Jaffrey. Sadly, Stephen passed away on July 15. "Steve had two favorite sports: politics and baseball. As founder and President of SCM Associates, a Republican direct-response fundraising firm, and founder of Granite Lists, a list management company, he was proud to be involved in many high-profile campaigns beginning with Pete duPont's run for President and including Mitt Romney's campaigns for Governor, President and Senator; Scott Walker and Charlie Baker's Gubernatorial campaigns and Speaker Ryan's campaigns to name a very few. President Ronald Reagan was his hero." Rest in Peace, Stephen. TWEET** OF THE WEEK Tweet With Us! | VIDEO OF SENATE PRESIDENT MORSE AT RED TOWN HALL RNC LAUNCHES "PAYCHECK PRESIDENT" WEBSITE House Speaker Gene Chandler Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Senate President Chuck Morse Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Executive Council Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Governor Chris Sununu Web - "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - Web - Facebook - Twitter - Chairman Jeanie Forrester "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - 10 Water Street, Concord, NH 03301 Phone: tel:6032259341 "tel:6032259341" | Email: mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" • • mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

| |
# [**Critical Deadline Approaching**](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjfxtd-kujulhlke-j/)
Peter, I just received this confidential memo from Emily. Please see below about our need for faithful Team Braun members to help during the summer. **[Can you chip in $25?](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjfxtd-kujulhlke-t/)** Ben \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Emily Daniels, Campaign Finance Director
To: Ben Mitchell, Campaign Manager
Date: July 18, 2018
Subject: Our Donors
Ben, We’ve been receiving amazing support from our core supporters and have been able to meet all of our campaign finance goals so far this year. With our new ad going out on TV to refute the lies of Sleepin’ Joe and our efforts to support President Trump’s Supreme Court nominee, Judge Brett Kavanaugh, we will need those faithful supporters to step up their support over the summer. I’m not concerned, because we know we can count on Hoosier conservatives, but we need to reach out to them so they know how to support our efforts. Respectfully,
Emily Daniels
Campaign Finance Director [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjfxtd-kujulhlke-i/) |

body:

| | **BREAKING POLL:**
Ted Budd 40
Kathy Manning 35
_Civitas Poll_ , 7/2018

[**CLOSE THE GAP: DONATE NOW**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427805/e3b7d3/5c74387a/2555f7f5/784902547/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180720?refcode=kme180720_m&recurring=true&amount=21") _This is huge._ Our race is within single digits. Because of you, and your help, this race is becoming one of the most competitive House races in the country. The _News and Observer_ even said that _" Democrats have a chance to flip"_ this seat. The momentum may be on our side, but don't be fooled. We're not the only people who read these polls and see these headlines. It is only a matter of time before the special interests flood North Carolina airwaves to defend Wall Street's best ally, Congressman Ted Budd. [**I need your support now more than ever. Click here to make a contribution.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427805/e3b7d3/5c74387a/2555f7f5/784902547/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180720?refcode=kme180720_m&recurring=true&amount=21") With over 30,000 grassroots donors and an average contribution of $21, we have shocked pundits who thought this was a longshot race. _Your grassroots support has taken a race that the incumbent won by 12 points in his last election to just single digits._ Political pundits agree: With four months to go until the election, our campaign is closing the gap. Unfortunately, in a post-_Citizens United_ world, a "more competitive" race also means a "more expensive" race. We can't let up now that we're in striking distance of Congressman Budd. name: Michael Soliman, MenendezForNJ.com
subject: Unacceptable: Hugin said gay members of his elite club "wouldn't last long."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
**"When New Jersey Republican Senate nominee Bob Hugin was a senior at Princeton University, he made it clear that gay students weren 't welcome."**
_\- Politico, 07/20/18_

**" Hugin fought to stop women from joining Princeton eating clubs."**
_- NJ.com, 7/20/18_

[**Bob Hugin is wrong for women, our LGBTQ community and New Jersey. Chip in to help Bob Menendez stop him from buying our United States Senate seat today.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cab/3af3c5d/3b972149/4ec3891e/1599798888/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_huginantiwoman?gpsid=5_73_2212&refcode=em18_180720_Tiger_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180720_Tiger_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Bob+Hugin+is+wrong+for+women+our+LGBTQ+c")
**[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cab/3af3c5d/3b972149/4ec38911/1599798888/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_huginantiwoman?gpsid=5_73_2212&refcode=em18_180720_Tiger_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180720_Tiger_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+DONATE")** Friend,

If you've been wondering why Bob Hugin enthusiastically continued to support Donald Trump while Trump repeatedly made bigotry and misogyny central themes in his campaign, we now have the answer.

Bob Hugin has held anti-women and anti-gay beliefs going back decades. While president of the all-male, exclusive Tiger Inn eating club at Princeton University, Hugin fought against the inclusion of women, and against campus anti-discrimination policies that included protections for gays and lesbians.

And when gay activists on campus tried to launch the Gay Alliance of Princeton, Hugin led a campus petition drive aimed at blocking the school from expanding its anti-discrimination policy to include gays and lesbians.

Hugin was even quoted as saying gay members of his elite club "wouldn't last long."

[**Bob Hugin can 't erase his past. He is a disgrace and unfit to represent New Jersey and all its vibrant diversity. Chip in $3 or more now to make sure Democratic U.S. Senator Bob Menendez is re-elected this November.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cab/3af3c5d/3b972149/4ec38910/1599798888/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_huginantiwoman?gpsid=5_73_2212&refcode=em18_180720_Tiger_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180720_Tiger_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Bob+Hugin+canrsquot+erase+his+past+He+is") **[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cab/3af3c5d/3b972149/4ec38913/1599798888/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_huginantiwoman?gpsid=5_73_2212&refcode=em18_180720_Tiger_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180720_Tiger_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=4+-+DONATE")** It's no wonder that Hugin has donated hundreds of thousands of dollars to candidates who have fought to roll back women's and LGBTQ rights and served as the New Jersey finance chair and a delegate for a presidential candidate who bragged about sexually assaulting women.

Bob Menendez has been a lifelong champion for women, reproductive rights, and equal pay and he has the record to back it up. He is the chief sponsor of the Equal Rights Amendment and has fought tirelessly to ensure all Americans, regardless of race, gender, sexual orientation, or status, have the opportunity to follow their dreams. Back when Hugin was fighting against women's inclusion at Princeton, Bob Menendez wrote and passed New Jersey's bias crime law as a state legislator -- one of the first in the nation to include protections for the LGBTQ community.

[**With Donald Trump and the Supreme Court already working to roll back women's rights and LGBTQ rights, it's never mattered more for New Jersey to have Bob Menendez fighting back in the United States Senate. Chip in $3 or more now.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cab/3af3c5d/3b972149/4ec38912/1599798888/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_huginantiwoman?gpsid=5_73_2212&refcode=em18_180720_Tiger_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180720_Tiger_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=5+-+With+Donald+Trump+and+the+Supreme+Court+")

Thank you,

Michael

Michael Soliman
Campaign Chair
Menendez for Senate

clean_body: "When New Jersey Republican Senate nominee Bob Hugin was a senior at Princeton University, he made it clear that gay students weren 't welcome." \- Politico, 07/20/18 " Hugin fought to stop women from joining Princeton eating clubs." - NJ.com, 7/20/18 "" "" Friend, If you've been wondering why Bob Hugin enthusiastically continued to support Donald Trump while Trump repeatedly made bigotry and misogyny central themes in his campaign, we now have the answer. Bob Hugin has held anti-women and anti-gay beliefs going back decades. While president of the all-male, exclusive Tiger Inn eating club at Princeton University, Hugin fought against the inclusion of women, and against campus anti-discrimination policies that included protections for gays and lesbians. And when gay activists on campus tried to launch the Gay Alliance of Princeton, Hugin led a campus petition drive aimed at blocking the school from expanding its anti-discrimination policy to include gays and lesbians. Hugin was even quoted as saying gay members of his elite club "wouldn't last long." "" "" It's no wonder that Hugin has donated hundreds of thousands of dollars to candidates who have fought to roll back women's and LGBTQ rights and served as the New Jersey finance chair and a delegate for a presidential candidate who bragged about sexually assaulting women. Bob Menendez has been a lifelong champion for women, reproductive rights, and equal pay and he has the record to back it up. He is the chief sponsor of the Equal Rights Amendment and has fought tirelessly to ensure all Americans, regardless of race, gender, sexual orientation, or status, have the opportunity to follow their dreams. Back when Hugin was fighting against women's inclusion at Princeton, Bob Menendez wrote and passed New Jersey's bias crime law as a state legislator -- one of the first in the nation to include protections for the LGBTQ community. "+" Thank you, Michael Michael Soliman Campaign Chair Menendez for Senate "" | Paid for by Menendez for Senate Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible. "" ""
